headline: Illinois Appellate Court Affirms $45 Million Mesothelioma Verdict Against Johnson & Johnson and Kenvue
summary: DALLAS, July 10, 2026--Dean Omar Branham Shirley, LLP (DOBS), announced today that the Illinois Appellate Court has affirmed a $45 million jury verdict awarded to the family of Theresa Garcia, who developed the deadly disease mesothelioma after decades of using Johnson & Johnson's Baby Powder. This product and other talc-based products have been found to be contaminated with asbestos.
